$comment: Optional, explicit declaration of the Oracle SQLcl MCP server.
For GitHub Copilot this is usually NOT required: the Oracle SQL Developer
extension (>= 25.2.0) auto-registers the SQLcl MCP server once you have a
saved DB connection. Keep this file for non-Copilot agents, for teammates,
or to make the dependency explicit. Update 'command' to your SQLcl path.
The server runs locally; your DB data never leaves your machine.
